customWittyPhrases: It works on my machine...
Have you tried turning it off and on again?
Blaming DNS...
It's always DNS.
No, seriously. It's DNS.
Checking if it's DNS... it's DNS.
Deploying to prod on a Friday...
LGTM. Didn't read it.
Resolving merge conflicts from 2019...
git push --force and pray...
Reverting the revert of the revert...
The CI pipeline is judging you...
Waiting for the pipeline... again...
Build failed. Surprise.
404: Motivation not found.
200 OK (probably)
503: Coffee service unavailable.
418: I'm a teapot.
Segfault in production. Classic.
rm -rf node_modules && npm install (the universal fix)
There are 2 hard problems in CS: cache invalidation, naming things, and off-by-1 errors.
Tabs vs spaces war: round 4,782...
Updating dependencies... pray for me.
This should only take five minutes...
Fixing the fix that fixed the fix...
Reading the error message this time...
Consulting Stack Overflow... oh wait, it's archived.
The intern pushed to main again...
chmod 777. Security is a spectrum.
sudo make me a sandwich.
Dockerizing the container that runs Docker...
Kubernetes wants more YAML. Feed it YAML.
The cloud is just someone else's computer...
Terraform plan: 47 to add, 0 to change, 312 to destroy. Proceed?
The helm chart has become sentient...
Scaling horizontally because fixing the bug is harder...
Adding more RAM should fix it.
Microservices: because one monolith wasn't enough problems.
The sprint ends tomorrow. We started yesterday.
Agile: moving fast in no particular direction.
Story points are made up and the deadlines don't matter.
Standup lasted 45 minutes. Nobody stood up.
Writing tests for code we'll delete next week...
100% code coverage. 0% confidence.
The regex works. Nobody knows why.
Commented out code from 2017. Too scared to delete it.
// TODO: fix this later (committed 3 years ago)
Works perfectly. Don't touch it. Don't look at it.
The logs say everything is fine. The users disagree.
Monitoring says green. Customers say red.
Alert fatigue is not a badge of honour.
On-call at 3am for a config typo. Living the dream.
The postmortem will be blameless. The Slack thread was not.
Rollback complete. Dignity not yet restored.
Feature flag everything. Trust nothing.
The database migration will be quick, they said.
SELECT * FROM problems WHERE solved = false; -- 47,000 rows
Caching: making the same mistake faster.
Premature optimisation is the root of all evil. But this is fine.
It compiled. Ship it.

hooks.name: astra-context-loader
hooks.description: Load user preferences and project context on session start

hooks.name: astra-skill-preflight
hooks.description: Detect tech keywords and nudge relevant skill activation

hooks.name: astra-secret-scanner
hooks.description: Block file writes containing secrets, API keys, or credentials

hooks.name: astra-code-standards
hooks.description: Code standards — blocks requirements.txt, warns on hardcoded state

hooks.name: astra-test-gate
hooks.description: TDD enforcement — blocks implementation writes when no test file exists, warns on missing sad path tests

hooks.name: astra-auto-lint
hooks.description: Auto-format and lint files after writes (ruff, biome, rustfmt)

hooks.name: astra-build-gate
hooks.description: Run build and type checks after agent completes coding tasks
